title: Reconcile historical duplicate TASK-005 lifecycle records
description: Organization-audit now correctly detects that TASK-005 exists as two semantically different records across open and done. Decide canonical identity strategy, preserve history, and clear audit failure without losing release provenance.
triage_notes: Completed by preserving the original done TASK-005 as canonical release history, renumbering the conflicting open record to TASK-018, and re-running organization-audit until task integrity returned green.
